steps.title: Find the defining action
steps.content: The passage states Jeyifous made “a series of new images” and describes his photographic process (photographing models and layering images). The blank verb must describe what someone does when producing new visual work.

steps.title: Match the action to the choices
steps.content: Created means to make or produce, directly fitting the action of generating new images. The other choices either imply reworking existing materials or suggest critique, which contradicts the focus on producing new work. That matches choice B — B is correct.
